hero.fileTitle: File:Feather of male Pavo cristatus (Indian peafowl).jpg
hero.alt: A beautiful portrait of a Peacock in the wild
hero.caption: The Peacock is a highly adapted species with unique behaviors.

habitat.alt: A Peacock navigating its natural environment
habitat.caption: They make their home in diverse habitats where they can find shelter and thrive.

diet.alt: A Peacock finding or consuming food
diet.caption: Finding food is a major part of the daily routine for a Peacock.

baby.alt: A young or baby Peacock showing early development
baby.caption: Baby Peacocks must learn to survive and adapt from a young age.

family.alt: A group of Peacocks interacting with each other
family.caption: While often solitary, some Peacocks interact with others of their species.

range.alt: A Peacock traveling across its geographic range
range.caption: Their geographic range covers various regions suited to their survival.

size.fileTitle: File:012 Indian peafowl in Keoladeo National Park Photo by Giles Laurent.jpg
size.alt: A photo showing the size of a Peacock
size.caption: The size of a Peacock can vary depending on its age and environment.

closeup.fileTitle: File:023 Indian peafowl in Jim Corbett National Park Photo by Giles Laurent.jpg
closeup.alt: A detailed close-up showing the physical features of a Peacock
closeup.caption: A close-up view reveals the intricate details of a Peacock's body.

fun-fact.alt: A Peacock showing a unique behavior or adaptation
fun-fact.caption: Did you know that the Peacock has amazing features that help it survive?

core-habitat.caption: They make their home in diverse habitats where they can find shelter and thrive.

core-diet.caption: Finding food is a major part of the daily routine for a Peacock.

core-family.alt: A group of Peacocks interacting with each other

core-baby.alt: A young or baby Peacock showing early development
core-baby.caption: Baby Peacocks must learn to survive and adapt from a young age.

core-range.caption: Their geographic range covers various regions suited to their survival.
